organization.name: CrossCountry Mortgage Cleveland
organization.raw_address: 2217 E 9th St, Cleveland, Ohio 44115, US
organization.short_description:
CrossCountry Mortgage (CCM) is a leading retail mortgage lender in the United States, founded in 2003 by Ron Leonhardt. With a mission to provide transparent and efficient loan processes, the company has expanded from its Cleveland roots to operate over 700 branches across all 50 states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico, employing more than 7,000 people.

CCM offers a wide range of mortgage solutions, including conventional and jumbo loans, government-insured programs, and proprietary home loans. As a direct lender, it is approved by major mortgage institutions like Freddie Mac, Fannie Mae, and Ginnie Mae. The company has achieved significant recognition, closing over 88,000 home purchases in 2024 and being named the top retail lender by *Scotsman Guide* and *Mortgage Executive Magazine*. Additionally, CCM is committed to community involvement through charitable activities and partnerships, including naming rights to the Cleveland Browns' practice facility.

organization.name: Rate
organization.raw_address: 3940 N. Ravenswood, Chicago, IL 60613, US
organization.short_description:
Rate, based in Chicago, is a residential mortgage company founded in 2000 by Victor Ciardelli. The company specializes in home purchase, refinance, and home equity loans, emphasizing low rates and fast approvals. With over 340 branches across 47-50 states and more than 4,000 agents, Rate operates nationwide and offers services through online applications, mobile apps, and in-person support.

Rate utilizes advanced technology to streamline the mortgage process, providing quick preapprovals and one-day mortgage approvals. The company offers a variety of mortgage options, including fixed-rate, adjustable-rate, FHA, VA, and specialized loans for unique borrower needs. Key programs include PowerBid Approval for competitive bidding and OneDown for low-to-moderate income borrowers, which provides down payment assistance. Rate is committed to serving diverse customer profiles, including Spanish speakers and self-employed individuals, while maintaining a focus on transparency and customer service.

organization.raw_address: Mutual of Omaha Plaza, Omaha, NE 68175, US
organization.short_description:
Mutual of Omaha is a Fortune 500 mutual insurance and financial services company based in Omaha, Nebraska. Founded in 1909, it operates as a mutual company owned by its policyholders. The company provides a wide range of insurance and financial products to individuals, businesses, and groups across all 50 U.S. states, with over 6.7 million policies in force and more than 19 million members.

The company offers various products, including life insurance, annuities, Medicare Supplement insurance, dental insurance, disability insurance, and long-term care coverage. Mutual of Omaha has a strong commitment to community involvement, supporting numerous nonprofits through the Mutual of Omaha Foundation and encouraging employee volunteerism. With a history of innovation and stability, the company has maintained a significant financial presence and continues to focus on serving its customers effectively.

organization.name: Nations Lending
organization.raw_address: 4 Summit Park Drive, Suite 200, Independence, OH 44131, US
organization.short_description:
Nations Lending Corporation is a national mortgage lender based in Independence, Ohio, founded in 2003. The company specializes in consumer finance and home loans, operating as an independent mortgage banker approved by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae. It is licensed to lend in all 50 states and employs approximately 605 to 998 people, generating around $515.6 million in revenue. The leadership team, including President Bill Osborne and CEO Jeremy Sopko, emphasizes a compassionate approach to lending, focusing on individual borrowers and community support.

Nations Lending offers a range of mortgage services, including home loan origination and approval, personalized mortgage advising, and nationwide lending. The company prioritizes genuine conversations with borrowers to assess their needs and qualifications, ensuring a streamlined application process. With a commitment to fostering a supportive workplace, Nations Lending has been recognized as a Top Workplace, promoting employee engagement and community involvement.

organization.name: Ruoff Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 1670 Magnavox Way, Fort Wayne, Indiana 46804, US
organization.short_description:
Ruoff Mortgage is a family-owned independent mortgage bank based in Fort Wayne, Indiana, founded in 1984 by David L. Ruoff. The company has grown significantly, now employing over 700 people across multiple states. It operates as a residential mortgage originator, focusing on community-oriented lending and customer transparency. Ruoff Mortgage is known for its efficient closing process, often achieving a clear-to-close timeline of just 15 days through in-house underwriters.

The company offers a variety of residential mortgage products, including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, and jumbo loans, as well as financing for new home construction and renovations. Ruoff Mortgage emphasizes an educational approach, with loan officers guiding clients through their options to facilitate informed decisions about homeownership. Under the leadership of CEO Mark Music, the company maintains a strong reputation and is committed to building generational wealth for clients while fostering community partnerships.

organization.short_description:
Cornerstone First Mortgage, LLC is a full-service mortgage bank and lender based in San Diego, California. Founded by Sean Cahan, who has over 20 years of experience in the mortgage industry, the company has grown to operate more than 100 branches across 49 states and Puerto Rico. It offers in-house processing, underwriting, funding, and brokerage services, focusing on innovative technology and excellent customer service.

The company provides a variety of home loan programs, including purchase loans, refinance options, construction loans, and vacation property mortgages. All loan processes are managed in-house, ensuring efficiency and convenience through online uploads and e-signing. Cornerstone is licensed in multiple states, including Alabama, Arizona, California, Florida, and North Carolina, among others. Clients appreciate the company's responsiveness and expertise, often returning for additional services.

organization.name: Amerifirst Home Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 950 Trade Centre Way, Suite 400, Kalamazoo, MI 49002, US
organization.short_description:
Amerifirst Home Mortgage is a mortgage banking company based in Portage, Michigan, founded in 1983. It specializes in residential mortgage lending, offering conventional loans, government-backed programs, and renovation mortgages. The company has grown to over 300 licensed loan consultants across the United States, with a strong presence in states like Florida, Michigan, Ohio, North Carolina, and California. 

In December 2022, Amerifirst was acquired by Union Home Mortgage, enhancing its national reach, particularly in USDA Rural Development loans. The company emphasizes ethical practices and customer commitment under the motto "Promises Kept." Amerifirst provides a full range of mortgage services, including FHA, VA, and USDA loans, and is recognized for its strong performance in the Michigan market.

organization.name: VanDyk Mortgage Corporation
organization.raw_address: 2449 Camelot Court SE, Grand Rapids, MICHIGAN 49546, US
organization.short_description:
VanDyk Mortgage Corporation is a national mortgage banker and broker based in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Founded in 1987 by Thomas L. VanDyk, the company operates in over 43 states with approximately 90 branch locations and around 500 employees. It specializes in full-service mortgage banking and is approved as a Fannie Mae Seller/Servicer, FHA Direct Endorsement lender, and VA-approved lender.

The company offers a variety of mortgage products, including unique property loans, renovation loans, construction loans, foreign national loans, and reverse mortgages. VanDyk Mortgage is known for its client-centric approach, emphasizing open communication and integrity. It provides quick closings and fast funding, ensuring a smooth process for clients. The company has received recognition for its workplace culture and leadership, highlighting its commitment to delivering exceptional customer experiences.

organization.short_description:
Novus Home Mortgage, a division of Ixonia Bank, was established in 2019 and is based in Waukesha, Wisconsin. The company operates nationwide as a portfolio and correspondent lender, offering in-house underwriting to ensure faster closings. Novus emphasizes a customer-first approach, providing transparent communication, personalized guidance, and innovative technology to streamline the mortgage process.

With over 100 years of combined experience from its parent company, Novus offers a variety of loan products, including FHA, VA, and conventional loans, as well as specialized programs for medical professionals. The company is dedicated to providing tailored consultations and quick processing for home purchases and refinancing. Novus is BBB-accredited and focuses on delivering a stress-free homeownership experience with 24/7 transparency and dedicated support.

organization.name: HomeXpress Mortgage Corp
organization.raw_address: 1936 E. Deere Ave., Suite 205, Santa Ana, California 92705, US
organization.short_description:
HomeXpress Mortgage Corp is a mortgage lender based in Santa Ana, California, founded in 2015. The company specializes in non-QM (non-qualified mortgage) loans, business-purpose residential loans, and Agency mortgage products. Operating primarily as a wholesale lender, HomeXpress partners with approved brokers across 46 states and Washington, D.C. It has established itself as one of the top three non-QM wholesale lenders in the U.S., with a lifetime origination volume exceeding $10.7 billion.

HomeXpress offers a variety of mortgage products tailored to meet diverse borrower needs. This includes non-QM loans, business-purpose loans, and conventional products such as FHA, VA, and Prime Jumbo loans. The company emphasizes responsible lending and aims to provide speed, ease, and convenience in its services. With a team of approximately 300 employees and an executive team boasting over 150 years of combined experience, HomeXpress is well-equipped to support its broker network in delivering flexible lending solutions.

organization.short_description:
Mutual of Omaha Mortgage is a dedicated home financing subsidiary of Mutual of Omaha Insurance Company, established in 2016. With a legacy dating back to 1909, the company operates in 49 states, providing a customer-centric approach to mortgage lending. It combines online and retail services, ensuring a fully digital experience alongside traditional in-person support.

The company offers a wide range of home financing solutions, including conventional, FHA, VA, jumbo, USDA, and investor loans, as well as various refinancing options. They cater to diverse borrower segments, including first-time homebuyers, veterans, existing customers, and property investors. Mutual of Omaha Mortgage is committed to long-term customer support, emphasizing integrity and transparency throughout the homeownership journey. The lender is recognized for its competitive interest rates and user-friendly application process, earning high ratings for affordability and availability.

Liberty Home Mortgage Corporation is a direct mortgage lender based in Independence, Ohio. Founded in 2013, the company specializes in residential home loans and operates across 45 states. With a team of 138 employees, Liberty Home Mortgage is committed to providing exceptional customer service and has maintained an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau since 2015.

The company offers a comprehensive range of mortgage products, including VA, USDA, FHA, and conventional loans, as well as rehab loans, refinances, and options for borrowers with less-than-perfect credit. Liberty Home Mortgage emphasizes a client-focused culture, prioritizing customer satisfaction and education on loan options. The workplace is designed to foster a positive environment, featuring music, festive decorations, and community engagement initiatives. organization.name: Fifth Third Bank
organization.raw_address: 38 Fountain Square Plaza, Cincinnati, Ohio 45202, US
organization.short_description:
Fifth Third Bank is a prominent regional bank based in Cincinnati, Ohio, with a history that dates back to 1858. It operates over 1,100 branches and 2,400 ATMs across 11 states, providing a wide range of financial services to individuals, families, businesses, and communities. The bank has a strong commitment to innovation and community impact, recognized multiple times as one of Ethisphere’s World’s Most Ethical Companies.

The bank offers comprehensive services, including personal and business banking, loans, mortgages, and investments. Fifth Third has a history of pioneering financial solutions, such as the first private fund for women's education and various electronic banking innovations. It focuses on empowering customers through tailored financial services and community initiatives, including the Fifth Third Foundation, which has been active since 1948. The bank emphasizes its role in supporting local markets and fostering economic growth in the regions it serves.

organization.name: American Pacific Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 3000 Lava Ridge Ct, Suite 200, Roseville, California 95661, US
organization.short_description:
American Pacific Mortgage (APM) is a national retail mortgage lender based in Roseville, California, founded in 1996. The company operates in 49 states with over 350 branches and employs more than 2,700 people. APM became 49% employee-owned in 2021, fostering a culture of retention and accountability. The company has funded over $22 billion annually and closed $13 billion in residential mortgages in 2022, serving more than 300,000 customers.

APM offers a full range of residential mortgage lending services, including specialty loan products tailored to various borrower needs. The company emphasizes a seamless digital experience combined with personal interactions through local Loan Advisors. APM partners with Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac to provide affordable lending options and has integrated programs like HomeLight's "Buy Before You Sell" to enhance customer transactions. The APM Cares program supports employees and communities through grants and essential services, reflecting the company's commitment to building community and promoting the "American Dream."

organization.short_description:
Absolute Home Mortgage Corporation is a mortgage banking service provider based in Fairfield, New Jersey. With over 20 years of experience in the industry, the company employs around 272 people and generates annual revenue of $138.2 million. It is recognized as an accredited business by the Better Business Bureau with an A+ rating and is a member of the Mortgage Bankers Association.

The company offers a range of mortgage banking services tailored to meet the needs of both new home buyers and existing homeowners. This includes mortgage solutions for first-time buyers, refinancing options, and customized loan products for clients with unique financial situations. Absolute Home Mortgage focuses on providing personalized lending solutions rather than one-size-fits-all options. With a growing presence along the East Coast and expansion into the Midwest and West Coast, the company has originated approximately $1 billion in mortgages, supported by a team of about 190 loan officers.

Paramount Residential Mortgage Group Inc. (PRMG Inc.) is a privately held mortgage company and residential home lender founded in 2001 in Southern California. The company specializes in helping borrowers purchase and refinance homes across the United States. With a workforce of over 2,000 employees and nearly 180 branches in 49 states, PRMG has established itself as one of the top mortgage lenders in the country.
